sources.content:
FUNCTION_BLOCK FB_Limited
VAR
    _position : DINT;
END_VAR
END_FUNCTION_BLOCK

PROPERTY PUBLIC FB_Limited.Position : DINT
GET
    Position := _position;
END_GET
SET
    IF Position > 100 THEN
        _position := 100;
    ELSE
        _position := Position;
    END_IF;
END_SET
END_PROPERTY
